description: Google Compute Engine is Google Cloud’s infrastructure service for creating and managing virtual machines and related compute resources such as disks, networks, and load-balancing components. It is part of Google Cloud Platform and is managed through Google APIs and the Google Cloud CLI.
summary: Google Compute Engine exposes a REST API at `https://compute.googleapis.com/compute/v1`, a public MCP server at `https://compute.googleapis.com/mcp` (streamable HTTP), and the `gcloud compute` CLI.

packages.runtimeHint: Install via the Google Cloud SDK
